title: Create /signup page HTML structure and CSS
description: Create the signup.html page with the card container, heading, and shared layout. No form logic yet — just structure and styling.
acceptance_criteria: signup.html exists at the project root (or /pages/signup.html)
Page has a centred card container, max-width 420px
FlatFinder logo or wordmark appears at the top of the card
The page is responsive and displays correctly on 375px wide viewport
Matches the visual style of the existing beta-signup.html (fonts, colours)

steps.description: Create signup.html with base HTML boilerplate
steps.details: Copy the <head> section (meta tags, Google Fonts link, favicon) from beta-signup.html. Add a <main> with a centred card div.
Card styles: max-width: 420px; margin: 80px auto; padding: 40px 32px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); background: #fff.
h1: 'Create your account'. p: 'Find your next flat or list your property.'
Open in browser, use DevTools device toolbar at 375px. Confirm card does not overflow horizontally.

technical_notes: Keep all auth-page CSS in a shared auth.css file to avoid duplication across signup, login, and onboarding pages.
